---
title: "Activity Creation and Editing by Leaders"
labels: [enhancement]
---

## Feature
Allow club leaders to create, edit, and manage activities/events for their clubs.

## Why
Currently, activities are static and only editable by code. This will empower leaders to organize events dynamically.

## Acceptance Criteria
- UI for leaders to add/edit/delete activities
- Only authorized users can manage their club's activities
- Changes are reflected in the activity list
